questions.question: Should Cash Flow follow current legacy getCashFlowReport exactly?
questions.defaultRecommendation: YES — remain official until finance approves change

questions.question: Should Cash Flow follow unified Roznamcha/effective_party basis?
Should correction/reversal/void rows be hidden in normal mode and shown only in audit?
Should opening balances be calculated from all prior activity or only period rows?
questions.defaultRecommendation: Finance confirm — DIN BRIDAL opening_balance_account rows drove delta

questions.question: Should internal transfers be shown gross, net, or excluded?
questions.defaultRecommendation: CRITICAL for DIN CHINA — preview gross legs vs legacy transfer presentation

questions.question: Which source modules should be included in normal Cash Flow?
questions.defaultRecommendation: Current all-modules filter for both sides

questions.question: Should DIN CHINA and DIN BRIDAL deltas be accepted as rule differences or fixed?
questions.defaultRecommendation: Rule confirmation first — do not accept as official without review
questions.notes: DIN CHINA: large transfer-leg treatment. DIN BRIDAL: opening_balance_account + JE mapping.
